sections_cited: Section 25 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-6497 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 27524/2022 2. For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 M/s. Hamza Waheed and Sami-ur-Rehman Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner is aggrieved by selection of case for audit under Section 25 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 and that such selection is not in consonance with the D.B. Judgment of this Court reported as [ 126 TAX 191 (H.C.Kar.)] Wazir Ali Industries Ltd. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others. Be that as it may, he states that all legal objections shall be taken before the issuing authority. He seeks that the issuing authority adjudicate the notice after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against them. Learned counsel for the Respondent department articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid term. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
